name: Jaws Mustang Acquisition Corp
summary: PARTI Overview We are a blank check company incorporated on October19, 2020 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses in any industry or sector.
